data.title: Misleading, Fraud, Scam
data.content: I signed up for the 3 day free trial. Made sure to select the option to be reminded when the free trial ends. Good thing I set a reminder in my calendar. I signed up on July 15th. Cancelled the subscription July 18th. Why am I being charged for the yearly membership? I don’t want to pay for it obviously. I shouldn’t have to. It’s ironic how this app is supposed to help your mindset and now my stress has increased. I am so frustrated with these scamming apps.
data.author: Viktoria_808

data.title: No longer that useful
data.content: I have now used this app for a little over a year. It was really great at first, very helpful and encouraging. But as time progresses, it has become way less useful, and quite frankly, rather annoying at times. While they do occasionally add new affirmations to existing categories, it’s literally the same old stuff over and over again. Sometimes the word order changes, but it’s otherwise 100% the same. There have been other updates, but a lot of them appear to be more cosmetic than substantive. The entire experience is just getting old rather fast.

data.title: Misleading Free Trial & Unexpected Annual Charge
data.content:
I signed up because the app advertised a free trial and stated that I would receive a reminder before the trial ended. Unfortunately, I never received any reminder or notification.

I planned to cancel my subscription, but shortly after midnight I discovered I had already been charged for an entire yearly subscription instead of the monthly plan I expected. The charge was significant, and despite contacting support, I was unable to get a refund.

This experience felt very misleading. If you’re considering this app, make sure you manually set your own reminder to cancel because you may not receive the notification they promise. Also, double-check your subscription settings carefully, as mine renewed to an annual plan automatically.

I would not recommend this app based on my experience.

data.author: Jubags111

data.title: Annoying lying notifications
data.content:
I’m about to delete this app, it’s driving me nuts. 
  Recently within the last couple months I’ve started getting notifications throughout the day about ‘losing my streak’ even though I’ve already checked the app. Now I’m getting about 6 notifications a day about ‘losing my streak’, ‘only one freeze available’ and now ‘start a new streak’ which came an hour after a ‘save streak’ message on the same day. It makes no sense and it’s driving me crazy. 
  My other biggest complaint is that when I open the app and swipe once to a new page there’s always an annoying something that pops up from the app. I feel like I can’t even use the app because it’s always interrupting. These are different messages, like ads to buy the subscription, insistence to share the message, pop ups to recommend changing backgrounds. I’ve been using the app over a year. I know how to share and I know how to change backgrounds, stop interrupting my actual use of the app - at very least so quickly.
  Additionally, but less annoyingly, some of the backgrounds are animated and have sound and they will interrupt music or podcasts you may have playing in the background, easy enough to fix- switch to a background not animated. 

I wish the free background options had a few more scenic options that weren’t so bright but that just a personal preference from someone very light sensitive. I do like that the free background options change every so often to include different images - don’t get attached to favorite images it might not be free next time but it’s nice to see something new.
